name: Chasing south-facing light in a 650 sq ft apartment

summary: Lactose intolerant, still shooting comfort food. The swaps and tricks that keep the texture honest on camera.

summary: A personal project on the Flushing night market. Mixed neon, hand-held, the A7IV pushed to its limits.

name: Tethered with Capture One: my restaurant workflow
summary: How I run a 25-shot restaurant package tethered on set so clients sign off before I pack the lights.

name: Editing oat-milk lattes: warm tones in Lightroom
summary: My Lightroom recipe for the Sweetleaf latte look: pulled highlights, lifted shadows, a hair of orange in the split tone.
